name: Oak Hill Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Oak Hill Baptist Church in Somerset, KY! There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Please view the Somerset Pickleball Facebook page for any changes to the schedule
